# Project 1: House Price Prediction (End-to-End ML)
## Project Goal
Build a complete machine learning pipeline:
1. Load a real dataset
2. Explore data (visualize)
3. Prepare data (clean, preprocess)
4. Train model (linear regression)
5. Evaluate performance
6. Make predictions
7. Save model for later use
## Timeline
- Week 1-2: Data exploration + preprocessing
- Week 2-3: Model training + evaluation
- Week 3-4: Deployment + documentation
## Dataset
Option 1: Kaggle "House Prices" dataset
Option 2: UCI ML Repository - Housing dataset
Option 3: Create synthetic data
## Expected Outcome
- Jupyter notebook with full pipeline
- Model accuracy > 85%
- GitHub repo with code + documentation
- Blog post explaining approach
